body_txt: This trope is not necessarily limited to the above situation; sometimes a main but not central character will end up taking care of the sugar-loving mascot and occasionally we'll even see a villain have one. Compare Mars Wants Chocolate , when aliens become enamored with Earth's food. Other characters typically being characterized as having a Sweet Tooth are geniuses . Contrast Sinister Sweet Tooth , when loving sugar is shorthand for villainy.     Pokémon World of Warcraft
